title: Verilator Internal error related to loop unrolling

features.name: delayed assignment to array element inside for loop in task
features.description: Code should include a task containing a begin block with a for loop where delayed assignments (#) are made to array elements

features.name: begin block with non-blocking delayed assignment to array in task
features.description: Code should include a task with a begin block containing a non-blocking delayed assignment to an unpacked array using the <= operator with delay
